task: Create an engineering enablement brief for a new Agent Framework team. Explain messages, agents, function tools, MCP, A2A, WorkflowBuilder graphs, custom executors, AgentExecutor nodes, fan-out/fan-in, routing, group chat, magentic coordination, hosting, and observability. Exclude hosted cloud-only primitives that do not fit a local Ollama sample.
subject: agent-framework-primitives-lab
constraints: Name primitives intentionally excluded from the local lab.
